title: Action-Oriented Indoor Navigation Assistance
description:
Developed an indoor navigation system for visually impaired individuals using YOLO-based object detection and monocular depth estimation models.
Integrated multiple modules into an end-to-end pipeline with real-time inference and text-to-speech feedback for actionable navigation assistance.

title: VascCoach: Knowledge Graph-based RAG System
description:
Built a RAPTOR-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system over 70+ medical research papers using hierarchical summarization.
Explored GraphRAG using Neo4j to enhance retrieval accuracy and enable structured querying over scientific literature.

title: Indoor Depth Estimation Challenge
description:
Developed a multi-stage pipeline combining MPRNet for image restoration and Depth Anything V2 for monocular depth estimation.
Engineered preprocessing techniques including CLAHE and Gaussian smoothing to improve robustness on noisy real-world images.

title: Agricultural Pests Detection
description:
Built a YOLOv8-based object detection model to identify 24 pest species across complex agricultural environments.
Handled high variability in lighting, foliage, and soil backgrounds to achieve robust detection performance.

title: Automatic Disfluency Detection
description:
Designed a system combining Whisper ASR and mT5 transformer models to correct speech disfluencies.
Improved model learning by training on aligned clean transcripts and noisy ASR outputs to capture semantic consistency.

title: SCS Organ Monitoring System
description:
Built a real-time monitoring dashboard for organ vitals (pH, temperature, humidity) with GPS tracking during transport.
Developed a telemetry pipeline integrating Arduino with Firebase via HTTP requests for live data visualization.

title: TA-Sim: IITM TA Interview Simulator
description:
Developed an interactive ML interview simulator using Next.js and Flask with automated evaluation.
Implemented a RAG pipeline using ChromaDB and Ollama (LLaMA 3) for contextual feedback generation.

title: Shravan: AI Companion for Elderly Care
description:
Built a full-stack healthcare platform using Flutter and Flask with an AI-powered assistant and medical chatbot.
Developed a multi-layer web scraping system using Selenium and LLM-based extraction for automated doctor discovery.

title: Heart Disease Detection MLOps Pipeline
description:
Deployed a production-grade ML pipeline on GCP using Docker and Kubernetes (GKE) for scalable inference.
Integrated MLflow and Evidently AI for experiment tracking and real-time monitoring of data drift and performance.

title: ACT Lab Website: Semantic Search Engine
description:
Built a full-stack platform using Next.js with dynamic APIs for research data and clinical content.
Developed a semantic search engine using vector embeddings and cosine similarity for improved information retrieval.

title: CureCue: Medical Adherence Assistant
description:
Developed a mobile-first AI system using YOLOv8 and PaddleOCR for medicine identification and expiry tracking.
Integrated Gemini 2.0 Flash for voice-based interaction and automated medication scheduling.
